name: Non-Profit Volunteer Newsletter
html_content:
Join HELPFUL SPACE
Email not displaying correctly? View it in your browser.
TOGETHER WITH THE NEXT GENERATION
We are dedicated to helping the next generation, supporting children of low-income families, giving them the emotional support and education they need to be successful.

We are looking for volunteers of all backgrounds to be part of our global team. Contribute to a community in need by signing up today.
JOIN US NOW
WHAT WE ARE DOING
EDUCATE
—
We have a versatile and fully-equipped education system for all learning levels and a variety interests.
SUPPORT
—
Our well-structured global team can provide timely support for those who need assistance.
EMPOWER
—
Our students obtain the life skills, support network, and education they need to succeed.
HOW YOU CAN START
Connect with a local group
Find the group nearest you and connect with the coordinators.
GROUPS NEAR ME
Come to our events
You don't need to be a member to join our events, just show up and say hi!
UPCOMING EVENTS

{{Sender_Name}}

{{Sender_Address}}, {{Sender_City}}, {{Sender_State}} {{Sender_Zip}}

Unsubscribe - Unsubscribe Preferences
♥ POWERED BY TWILIO SENDGRID
